basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website of PGIMER. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF).

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/EWS/Female candidates as per rules

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Professional course selected through National Eligibility tests- CSIR/UGC NET/ GATE including lectureship or National level examination as DST, DBT, ICMR etc.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (Project 1): Post Graduate degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Professional course selected through a process described through one of the following: a. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility tests- CSIR/UGC NET/ GATE including lectureship b. The selection process through National level examination as DST, DBT, ICMR etc. Desirable: Wet lab experience in handling blood and tissue samples Junior Research Fellow (Project 2): Post Graduate degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Professional course selected through a process described through one of the following: a. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility tests- CSIR/UGC NET/ GATE including lectureship b. The selection process through National level examination as DST, DBT, ICMR etc. Desirable: Experience in patient handling

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of PGIMER to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the PGIMER Junior Research Fellow positions is 13th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post announced by PGIMER. These vacancies are distributed across two different projects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Basic Science OR a Graduate/Post Graduate degree in a Professional course selected through national eligibility tests like CSIR/UGC NET/GATE or other national level examinations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Junior Research Fellow position is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/EWS/Female candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000, along with an additional House Rent Allowance (HRA) of 20%.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the PGIMER Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow positions will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the PGIMER Junior Research Fellow recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: For Project 1, wet lab experience in handling blood and tissue samples is desirable. For Project 2, experience in patient handling is considered desirable.
